query: SELECT id, actor_id, name, type, data_source, description FROM threat_actors WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR LOWER(actor_id) LIKE '%aceofcloud%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%ace of cloud%' OR LOWER(actor_id) LIKE '%ace_of_cloud%' OR LOWER(aliases) LIKE '%aceofcloud%'
